examples: There is a great article over at their blog about how great summaries disambiguate topics.
Note that, at this point, I chose to disambiguate the nouns and the verb only to make a basic point.
To help disambiguate output from different requests, it also logs a request parameter used as an identifier.
The site links to name if it can locate or disambiguate who you are referring to and if you have them in your network.
